---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do that forget-rag doesn't currently support?
Be concrete — a real use case is more useful than an abstract feature
list.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. Code snippets, mock CLI invocations, or API
sketches all welcome.

```python
# Example of how you'd use it
```

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds have you tried? What other tools or approaches did you
look at? This helps avoid reinventing existing solutions.

## Scope check

forget-rag follows a strict ROADMAP and tries to stay small and focused.
Before opening, please skim:

- [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md) — is this already planned?
- [docs/architecture.md](../../docs/architecture.md) — does it fit the
  three-primitive model (heat / tiers / forget)?

If the answer to either is "no it's a different model entirely," that's
fine — flag it explicitly so we can discuss whether it belongs here or
in a separate tool.
